Anthropos

A design‑focused campaign addressing homelessness in NYC through research, messaging, and resource routing.

Problem

Create a public‑facing campaign that makes complex homelessness data approachable while guiding people to actionable resources.

Approach

Researched local datasets and community orgs to define key pain points.

Built a visual system that balanced empathy with clarity.

Structured content for fast scanning on mobile.

Role & Tools

Role: Design, UX, front‑end build

Tools: Illustrator, Photoshop, HTML/CSS, Netlify
